title: Muffin's Thai's Delight
description:
Cooking expansion focus on Thai's Food.

## About
***
A Minecraft Mod Addon to the famous food mod. Farmer's Delight!

Focus on adding content related to Thai's Culture and Thai food!

***
![https://imgur.com/l72vG1X](https://imgur.com/l72vG1X.png)
- Papaya
- Pepper
- Lime
***
![https://imgur.com/M0MfABF](https://imgur.com/M0MfABF.png)
- Somtam
- Spicy Minced Meat Salad
- Crab Fried Rice
- Stir Fried Noodle
- Lime Juice
- Papaya Juice
